summary: NodeSidePanel.vue + ReceiptTree.vue. DUMB inspector — props { node, status, receipt, commits } in, close event out. No fetch / no setInterval / no JSON.parse — caller pre-shapes inputs (§Dumb-components). Live status badge driven by upstream realtimeBridge wiring. Receipt rendered via recursive ReceiptTree.vue (collapsible JSON tree, primitive-typed coloring). Validators rendered as pass/fail checklist with rule + evidence. Produces[] linked as code paths; commits[] shown with sha+subject+date.

validation.evidence: cd viewer && pnpm exec vue-tsc --noEmit → exit 0
